title: Backtesting Promo
author: FantasticShine4012
selftext: Can i promote a backtesting site here or does reddit not allow it????? Historical OHLCV data for forex, stocks, ETFs, commodities and crypto. Clean, verified, ready to use. CSV format compatible with any trading platform.All data is delivered as CSV files compressed in a ZIP archive. Each file contains: timestamp, open, high, low, close, volume. The timestamp is in UTC ISO 8601 format. Compatible with Python (pandas), R, MetaTrader, NinjaTrader, TradingView, and any platform that reads CSV.
